message:
fix(command,runtime): refine BGSAVE/SHUTDOWN validation with bitflag parsing and SyntaxError

BGSAVE: validate SCHEDULE option. SHUTDOWN: parse NOSAVE/SAVE/NOW/
FORCE/ABORT as bitflags, validate illegal combinations, return
SyntaxError. Add comprehensive tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
